pi_items.source: Task description directly specifies the query name as 'Monthly Billing View'.
Redmine TimeEntryQuery class source code defines these exact internal column names corresponding to Date, User, Activity, Issue, Comment, and Hours.
Task description specifies grouping by 'Project', which corresponds to the internal Redmine column name 'project'.
Redmine source code (app/models/query.rb) defines VISIBILITY_PUBLIC = 2, which corresponds to 'visible to any users (Public)' as specified in the task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom TimeEntryQuery named 'Monthly Billing View'. Redmine internally maps the 'Public' (any user) visibility to the integer value 2. The internal Redmine column names for Date, User, Activity, Issue, Comment, and Hours are exactly 'spent_on', 'user', 'activity', 'issue', 'comments', and 'hours'. Grouping by project uses the internal string 'project'. The time entries seeded for the task are synthetically generated using a Ruby script.
